summary: This document defines the intended use and operational scope of the 'AI Doctor & Patient Consultation Platform' within NHS GP practices. It outlines the six-step operating principle, user profiles, and safety constraints, emphasizing that clinical decisions remain with medical staff. The text serves as a technical specification within the Quality Management System to define product boundaries and compliance requirements.
